query:
-- Verify assignment coverage after fix
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN sba.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withAssignment,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sba.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missingAssignment,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
WHERE bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  AND bi.serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND bi.serviceExternalId != '';

-- Verify assignment coverage after fix
SELECT 
  SUM(CASE WHEN sba.id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as withAssignment,
  SUM(CASE WHEN sba.id IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as missingAssignment,
  COUNT(*) as total
FROM billing_items bi
LEFT JOIN service_billing_assignments sba ON sba.billingItemExternalId = bi.externalId
WHERE bi.matchStatus IN ('matched', 'service-matched')
  AND bi.serviceExternalId IS NOT NULL AND bi.serviceExternalId != '';
